title: senecio lactucoides
intro: Senecio lactucoides, also known as Jerusalem thistle, is a flowering plant belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae, which is native to the western and central regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. Senecio lactucoides offers several health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal preparations to promote overall well-being and combat various health conditions.
